_description: Synthesizer Labship full ability sweep. Setup: Alice has Synthesizer Labship preloaded with 7 charge counters (one Station shy of 9+), a 2/2 Glory Seeker to feed into Station, and a Lander token that can be the target of the 2+ trigger. Sequence: (1) Sorcery-speed: Activate Station, tap Glory Seeker — Synthesizer gets 2 more charge counters, total 9 → becomes an artifact creature with flying and vigilance. (2) Enter combat — 2+ trigger fires, target the Lander; the Lander becomes a 2/2 artifact creature with flying until end of turn. (3) Attack with both Synthesizer (4/4 flying, vigilance) and Lander (2/2 flying). Use BEGIN_COMBAT stop step to observe the trigger before declare attackers.
